S.FORM: Zambia Itini i 15 00 S, 30 00 E, noAfilika ko Zambia. Polong no sekalay i 752,618 sq km "saka 39 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 743,398 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 9,220 sq km " Polong i 15,510,711 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 31.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 66.30%, malo no roma to a sera 2%. siyoto O (((Lusaka)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 24 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Edgar Lungu, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 25 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: *amb~b~via itini i ** ** s, ** ** …ô, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u *amb~b~via. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra *%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((…ĺo~u~usaka)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakamo~u…ôt…ôp ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …ô…¨~…ģ*ar …ĺo~u~uŇčo~u~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Zambia Itini i 15 00 S, 30 00 E, noAfilika ko Zambia. Polong no sekalay i 752,618 sq km "saka 39 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 743,398 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 9,220 sq km " Polong i 15,510,711 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 31.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 66.30%, malo no roma to a sera 2%. siyoto O (((Lusaka)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 24 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Edgar Lungu, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 25 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
